zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford是Robert Wilford of Oxton和Joan的女兒，於大約1459年出生在英國戴文。她和John Farringdon II至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1517年7月8日之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford是Robert Wilford of Oxton和Joan的女儿，于大约1459年出生在英国戴文。她和John Farringdon II至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1517年7月8日之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Wilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): habitational name from either of two places called Wilford, in Nottinghamshire and Suffolk, both probably named with an Old English wilig ‘willow tree’ + Old English ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Wilfert
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wolf ‘wolf’ + hart ‘hardy, brave’, ‘strong’.
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements willio ‘will, wish’ + fridu ‘peace’.

variants.name: Willford
meanings: English (East Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Rutland, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Wilford  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford was born about 1459, in Devon, England as the daughter of Robert Wilford of Oxton and Joan. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with John Farringdon II. She died before 8 July 1517, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford est née environ 1459, à Devon, Angleterre, fille de Robert Wilford of Oxton et Joan. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec John Farringdon II. Elle est décédée avant 8 juillet 1517, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford wurde um 1459 in Devon, England, als Tochter von Robert Wilford of Oxton und Joan geboren. Sie hatte mit John Farringdon II mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Juli 1517 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford è nata il circa 1459 nel Devon, England come figlia di Robert Wilford of Oxton e Joan. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con John Farringdon II. Morì prima del 8 luglio 1517, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Farringdon, Devon, England: イギリスデボンファリングドン
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilfordは約1459年にイギリスデボンでRobert Wilford of OxtonとJoanの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Farringdon IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1517年7月8日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford(은)는 대략 1459년 영국 데폰에서 Robert Wilford of Oxton(와)과 Joan의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Farringdon II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 7월 8일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1459–before 8 July 1517: ойролцоогоор 1459 он–1517 оны Долоодугаар сарын 8–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford nasceu aproximadamente 1459, em Devon, Inglaterra filha de Robert Wilford of Oxton e Joan. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com John Farringdon II. Ela faleceu antes 8 de julho de 1517, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford родилась около 1459 г. в местности девон, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert Wilford of Oxton и Joan. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от John Farringdon II. Она умерла перед 8 июля 1517 г. в её родном городе.

sm.about 1459–before 8 July 1517: e tusa o le 1459–a'e le'I oo le 8 Iulai 1517

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilford nació aproximadamente 1459, en Devon, Inglaterra como hija de Robert Wilford of Oxton y Joan. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con John Farringdon II. Murió antes de 8 de julio de 1517, en su pueblo.
